projects.name: Projctool
projects.summary: Projctool's architecture consists of an Angular frontend for a dynamic and responsive user interface, an ASP.NET Core backend for robust and scalable server-side processing, and a PostgreSQL database for reliable data storage. The integration of OpenAI's API allows for advanced AI functionalities, offering personalized and intelligent project management solutions. This combination ensures a seamless and efficient workflow for project managers, whether working on long-term initiatives or short sprints.

projects.name: Blockchain Ticketing System
projects.summary: A decentralized platform for event organizers and attendees to buy, sell, and verify event tickets securely using Ethereum blockchain.
